content: Rapier.js: Rust physics engine compiled to WASM, actively maintained, Apache-2.0, 2-5x faster than cannon-es, better for complex simulations. cannon-es: pure JS fork of cannon.js, largely unmaintained (last commit 2+ years ago). Recommendation: Rapier for production; cannon-es only for prototyping. For ImmersiveRT v1, physics is likely not needed (no physics simulation - just orientation/position mapping).
